reviews.review_description:
This is a really enjoyable VR puzzle game and the hand-tracking is spot on. Interactions are intuitive and precise so I could just focus on solving the challenges.

The puzzles themselves are well balanced. They’re not too hard and not too easy, which keeps the game relaxing but still engaging

Visually, the game isn’t pushing the limits of VR graphics, but they are good enough to look clean and clear, and they never distract from the puzzles themselves.

Hand Puzzles is a great pick if you want a calm, hands-on VR game that lets you just enjoy solving puzzles.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the thoughtful review! We’re really glad to hear that you enjoyed the puzzle design and that the hand-tracking felt intuitive and precise—that’s something we spent a lot of time refining.

It’s great to know the difficulty balance helped keep the experience relaxing while still engaging. Our goal with Hand Puzzles is exactly that: a calm, hands-on VR space where players can simply enjoy solving puzzles without unnecessary friction.

We also appreciate your comments about the visuals. We focused on keeping the graphics clean and clear so the puzzles remain the main focus, and we’re continuously working on improving the overall presentation in future updates.

Thanks again for playing and sharing your feedback—it really helps us improve the game!

Hi there, thank you for sharing your feedback. I’m sorry to hear that Hand Puzzles didn't meet your expectations. I’m currently working on the next update and would love to know specifically what went wrong or what features you found frustrating so I can improve the experience for you. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed playing Hand Puzzles. The puzzles natural to solve with hands unlike mobile, visuals looks great, A perfect game to train relax and train your brain at the same time
Enhance the mental ability, particularly for kids
